decision: NF4 efficient exact-parity DFlash compatibility unsupported on the tested SDPA/bfloat16 path.
root_cause: A one-forward-per-block target verifier diverges from cached autoregressive Baseline before any cache-state invariant fails. The frozen QMSum fixture first diverged at emitted token 16 with SDPA and token 56 with eager attention.
next_action: Use an upstream-supported target/backend for an efficient exact-parity DFlash claim, or retain NF4 only as an ablation with a revised claim boundary.
